name: model-view-workbench
description: MD-centric Model + View workbench (SPA, Electron, VS Code)

scripts.build: npm run build -w @mvwb/core && npm run build -w @mvwb/mermaid && npm run build -w @mvwb/mcp-server && npm run build -w @mvwb/web
scripts.build:mcp: npm run build -w @mvwb/core && npm run build -w @mvwb/mcp-server
scripts.build:vscode: npm run build && npm run copy:vscode-media && npm run compile --workspace=mvwb-workbench
scripts.test: npm run test -w @mvwb/core && npm run test -w @mvwb/mermaid
scripts.dev:web: npm run build -w @mvwb/core && npm run build -w @mvwb/mermaid && npm run dev -w @mvwb/web
scripts.dev:electron: npm run build -w @mvwb/core && npm run build -w @mvwb/mermaid && npm run build -w @mvwb/web && npm run dev -w @mvwb/electron
